texto: Typical St Mary’s. When the chips are down we don’t whine and we don’t run – we do some damage.
explicacao: Citação de Jodi Taylor sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Typical St Mary’s. When the chips are down we don’t whine and we don’t run – we do some damage.” articula reflexao, humorous, typical em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: No incident, however seemingly trivial, is unimportant in the scheme of things. One event leads to another, which triggers something else and before you know where you are, the ramifications spread far and wide throughout history, echoing down the ages; getting fainter and fainter but never completely dying away. They talk of the harmony of the spheres, but history is a symphony of echoes, every little action has huge consequences. They're not always apparent and sometimes, in our game, sometimes effect comes before cause, not after. It makes your head ache.
explicacao: Citação de Jodi Taylor sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “No incident, however seemingly trivial, is unimportant in the scheme of things. One event leads t…” articula lideranca, cause-and-effect, consequences em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como consequences e history.

One event leads to another, which triggers something else and before you know where you are, the ramifications spread far and wide throughout history, echoing down the ages; getting fainter and fainter but never completely dying away. They talk of the harmony of the spheres, but history is a symphony of echoes, every little action has huge consequences. They're not always apparent and sometimes, in our game, sometimes effect comes before cause, not after. It makes your head ache.
